summary: Iteration 27 - Tested ToolExplainerModal on all 9 tools, RecentToolOutputs, Notification deduplication, SavedOutputs page, and Course Planner features. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All 12 Playwright tests passed.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login - login with test credentials
Backend: GET /api/notifications - no duplicate titles after normalization
Backend: GET /api/history/recent/Hidden Curriculum Decoder - returns entries
Backend: GET /api/history/recent/Executive Function Planner - returns entries
Backend: POST /api/history/save + GET + DELETE - CRUD works
Frontend: Login and redirect to dashboard
Frontend: Brief Simplifier - tool-explainer-btn present, modal opens
Frontend: Course Planner - tool-explainer-btn present, upload zone visible
Frontend: Hidden Curriculum Decoder - tool-explainer-btn present
Frontend: Executive Function Planner - tool-explainer-btn present
Frontend: Saved Outputs page - saved-outputs-page testid present, 'My Outputs' title visible
critical_code_review_comments: ToolExplainerModal correctly implemented with data-testid='tool-explainer-modal' and content for all 9 tools
RecentToolOutputs component properly fetches from /api/history/recent/{tool_name} with limit=3
Notification deduplication uses alphanumeric normalization to prevent OCR artefact duplicates
SavedOutputs page has tool-specific renderers (RubricOutput, EssayOutput, HumaniserOutput, ScaffolderOutput) plus GenericOutput fallback
Course Planner has deriveWeekNumber() function that parses 'Week X' patterns from due_date strings
Course Planner colour legend includes 'Classes' item with indigo-500 colour
Course Planner has edit-plan-btn and export-planner-pdf-btn in output phase (requires document upload to test)
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test history entry during CRUD test

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. Stripe is in test mode. Anthropic/Claude via Emergent LLM Key.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 complete. All features verified: (1) ToolExplainerModal with data-testid='tool-explainer-btn' present on all 9 tool pages - Brief Simplifier, Rubric Simplifier, Essay Scorer, Humaniser, Assessment Scaffolder, Course Planner, Hidden Curriculum Decoder, Concept Visualiser, Executive Function Planner. (2) RecentToolOutputs component injected on all 9 tool pages, fetches from /api/history/recent/{tool_name}. (3) Notification deduplication working - normalizes titles by stripping non-alphanumeric chars. (4) SavedOutputs page at /saved-outputs has data-testid='saved-outputs-page', shows formatted entries grouped by tool with tool-specific renderers. (5) Navigation has 'My Outputs' link. (6) Course Planner has explainer button, upload zone in initial phase. Edit Plan and PDF export buttons are in output phase (requires uploading a real document to reach that phase). (7) Course Planner colour legend includes 'Classes' item. Test user: test@simplifii.com / test123.
